name: La Comer, S.A.B. de C.V.
summary: La Comer, S.A.B. de C.V., together with its subsidiaries, operates supermarkets in Mexico. Its supermarkets offer fruits and vegetables, meats and birds, prepared foods, pharmacy, wines and liquors, and hygiene and beauty products. As of December 31, 2019, the company operated 71 stores under the City Market, Fresko, La Comer, and Sumesa formats. It also sells its products online though La Comer en tu Casa, a digital platform. In addition, the company leases real estate contracts on stores; and transportation equipment. La Comer, S.A.B. de C.V. was founded in 1930 and is based in Mexico City, Mexico.
